content:
# Supervirtual Interferometry

**Summary**: A method used to enhance signal quality and extract first arrivals in seismic data by utilizing the correlation of signals from multiple sources.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016]] applied supervirtual interferometry to enhance first arrivals of 3D seismic refraction data.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The method showed a close match between noiseless and enhanced traces with errors less than 5%. ([[2016-edigbue|Edigbue, 2016, p. 64]])
